== Notes for [[Item:Q104177|Q104177]] ==

https://www.fundacioncajacirculo.es/AHCB_D.php?cod=29875L&nombre=L%C3%B3pez%20de%20Polanco,%20Gonzalo

https://www.fundacioncajacirculo.es/AHCB_D.php?cod=30695&nombre=L%C3%B3pez%20de%20Polanco,%20Gonzalo

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000076904616472

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
